title: HR
intro: Employees, pay and employment history. Changes append to a dated record — nothing is overwritten.
effectiveHint: When this change takes effect. Defaults to today; back-dating is allowed.
confirmDated: Apply the change with this effective date?
leftDone: Marked as left — their history is kept under Former employees.
recordFirstNote: Leave and bank holidays are managed on the Roster.
effectiveRequired: Required — pick the real date this change took effect (it may not be today).
voidConfirm: Void this entry? It stays visible in the history but no longer counts.

factor.label: Utilisation factor
factor.hint: Realistically, what share of this person’s available hours can be billed? A green apprentice can’t bill every hour; a competent full-time tech bills most. This sets the realistic expectation for the workshop — it never scores the individual.

saveNeedsDate: Set an effective date to save
